title: Gas consumption of legal persons (Valstybės duomenų agentūra)
description: [Publisher: Valstybės duomenų agentūra] The package contains data on the gas consumption of legal entities of the Energy Distribution Operator (ESO). Addresses are provided in rectangular stalls of 10 kilometres in the Lithuanian coordinate system (LKS-94). Cells with 5 or fewer users are not displayed. Data time coverage: from 1 January 2019.
